patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Realm Divided Patch 2
description: Realm Divided Patch 2 Combat Balance Changes (17 December 2025) — Axes, Bows, Cursed Staffs, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Spears, Armors, Potions.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Axes Internal Bleeding Damage moving targets Bows Multishot Damage players mobs Slow Poison Diminishing Returns Undead Arrows Attack speed Raging Storm Bow of Badon explosive arrows Cursed Staffs Cursed Sickle Stand time Daggers Ring of Death Twin Slayers Movement speed Fire Staffs Fire Wave Knockback Maces Gravitas Morning Star Multispell time window Threatening Smash Hit delay Stand time Nature Staffs Rejuvenation Charge defense vs mobs Quarterstaffs Soul Shaker Grailseeker Root mounted Vault Leap Damage Spears Slow Poison diminishing returns Armors Fury Soldier Armor toggle Potions Acid Potion Cooldown Calming Potion guard mobs Sticky Potion Duration

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Internal Bleeding Damage dealt to moving targets per tick 11 20

changes.raw_text: Internal Bleeding: Damage dealt to moving targets (per tick): 11 → 20

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Multishot Damage to players 116 100 mobs unchanged Slow Poison no longer applies diminishing returns still affected existing Undead Arrows Whispering Bow Attack speed buff 20% 30% Raging Storm Bow of Badon no longer applies explosive arrows

changes.raw_text: Multishot: Damage to players: 116 → 100 (damage to mobs unchanged)
Slow Poison: No longer applies slow diminishing returns (still affected by existing slow diminishing returns)
notes: No longer applies slow diminishing returns (still affected by existing slow DR)

changes.raw_text: Raging Storm: No longer applies explosive arrows on hit
notes: No longer applies explosive arrows on hit

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Cursed Sickle Stand time 0.4s 0.3s

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Ring of Death Twin Slayers Added Initial cast 40% movement speed 2s removed on recast

changes.raw_text: Ring of Death: Added: Initial cast now grants 40% movement speed for 2s (removed on recast)
notes: Added: Initial cast grants 40% movement speed for 2s (removed on recast)

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Fire Wave Knockback distance 2.05m 4m

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Gravitas Morning Star Multispell time window 3s 5s Threatening Smash Hit delay 0.4s 0.2s Stand time 0.5s 0.3s

changes.raw_text: Threatening Smash: Hit delay: 0.4s → 0.2s; Stand time: 0.5s → 0.3s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Rejuvenation Charge Added 5% defense vs mobs per stack others only

changes.raw_text: Rejuvenation Charge: Added: 5% defense vs mobs (per stack, others only)
notes: Added: 5% defense vs mobs per stack (does not apply to the caster; applies to others only)

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Soul Shaker Grailseeker Root vs mounted players 2s diminishing returns CC resistance Vault Leap Quarterstaff Damage 190 180

changes.raw_text: Soul Shaker: Root vs mounted players now has a base duration of 2s (affected by diminishing returns and CC resistance)
notes: Root vs mounted players: base duration 2s (affected by diminishing returns and CC resistance)

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Slow Poison no longer applies diminishing returns still affected existing

changes.raw_text: Slow Poison: No longer applies slow diminishing returns (still affected by existing slow diminishing returns)
notes: No longer applies slow diminishing returns (still affected by existing slow DR)

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Fury Soldier Armor toggle spell taking damage stacks Activation restores 30% missing health defenses decreased 10%

changes.raw_text: Fury: Now a toggle spell (taking damage while active still adds bonus damage and CC strength stacks). Activation restores 30% of missing health. While active, defenses are decreased by 10%.
notes: Now a toggle spell (taking damage while active still adds bonus damage and CC strength stacks)
While active, defenses are decreased by 10%
Transformations remove the effect; purges remove all Fury damage and CC strength stacks

subsections.heading: Potions
subsections.searchable_text: Potions Acid Potion Cooldown 60s 100s Calming Potion no longer affects guard mobs Faction Warfare Outpost Fortress Territory Castle City Guards Sticky Potion Duration 6s 7s

changes.raw_text: Calming Potion: No longer affects mobs that guard players (Faction Warfare Outpost mobs, Fortress and Territory mobs, Castle Guard mobs, City Guards)
notes: No longer affects: Faction Warfare Outpost mobs, Fortress and Territory mobs, Castle Guard mobs, City Guards
